section_miscategorizations.text: The rash is warm to the touch but not erythematous.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Describing a rash as warm to the touch but not erythematous is internally inconsistent with it being described as red in the same exam; however, this is a wording/clinical consistency issue, not a section placement problem. All other statements are in appropriate SOAP sections, and there are no clear section miscategorization errors.
